title: Mastering Cloud Computing: Core Components & Security Relationships
description: A flowchart illustrating the foundational pillars of cloud computing and the integral role security plays in connecting and protecting them.
elements: Essential Characteristics (On-demand, Broad Network Access, etc.)
relationships: Security is a cross-cutting concern that underpins and connects all service and deployment models
Essential characteristics enable the models, which are secured by practices like encryption and IAM
Deployment models host the service models, with security policies tailored to each
